basic_details.job_title: IIM Visakhapatnam Counsellor Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Management Visakhapatnam (IIM Visakhapatnam) Counsellor Notification 2026 has been released on 15 May 2026 on the official website. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the IIM Visakhapatnam Counsellor Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 35 years Relaxation in upper age is applicable as per Government of India rules. The Institute may also consider age relaxation in deserving cases.

qualification.education_qualification: M. Phil in Psychiatric Social Work
qualification.details: Counsellor (Psychiatric Social Worker): M. Phil in Psychiatric Social Work

selection_process: Written Test Personal Interview Other Assessments
how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the IIM Visakhapatnam Counsellor Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 07-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIM Visakhapatnam to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IIM Visakhapatnam COUNSELLOR post?
faq.answer: The last date to apply online for the COUNSELLOR (Psychiatric Social Worker) position at IIM Visakhapatnam is 07-06-2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the COUNSELLOR post?
faq.answer: The required educational qualification for the COUNSELLOR (Psychiatric Social Worker) position is M. Phil in Psychiatric Social Work. Ensure you meet this criterion before applying.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the COUNSELLOR post is 35 years. Age relaxation is applicable as per Government of India rules and may be considered for deserving candidates.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the COUNSELLOR position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the COUNSELLOR (Psychiatric Social Worker) post will receive a salary of Rs. 70,000 Per Month. This is a contract position.

faq.question: Q5. How many vacancies are available for the COUNSELLOR post?
faq.answer: There is only one vacancy available for the COUNSELLOR (Psychiatric Social Worker) position in this recruitment drive by IIM Visakhapatnam.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for the IIM Visakhapatnam COUNSELLOR (Psychiatric Social Worker) recruitment is online. Candidates need to apply through the official website.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment. The application is free of cost.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for the COUNSELLOR post?
faq.answer: The selection process for the COUNSELLOR (Psychiatric Social Worker) post includes a Written Test, Personal Interview, and Other Assessments. Candidates will be shortlisted based on their performance in these stages.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I find the official notification for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be accessed through the 'Important Links' section of this article. It is recommended to read the notification thoroughly before applying.

faq.question: Q10. What is the job type for this position?
faq.answer: The job type for the COUNSELLOR (Psychiatric Social Worker) position at IIM Visakhapatnam is on a contract basis.
